";"\066\069\105\076\083\117\061\061";"\115\109\106\088\072\101\120\061","\072\100\114\072\075\078\061\061";"\109\072\057\087\054\117\061\061";"\055\100\102\067\112\112\102\043\112\065\114\079\087\119\061\061";"\069\053\085\108\112\051\055\049\070\110\097\074\099\085\101\087\073\077\061\061";"\048\099\111\054\115\078\061\061","\117\077\112\081\086\106\073\112";"\097\102\121\089\113\119\061\061"}local function s(s)return n[s+(-367940-(-376516))]end for s,D in ipairs({{1025778-1025777;-674641+675391};{212127-212126;741284-740791},{927321+-926827,873591+-872841}})do while D[-638189+638190]<D[534001+-533999]do return i(w)end,function(n,s)local i=P(s)local m=function(m)return D(n,{m},s,i)end return m end,{},function(n,s)local i=P(s)local m=function(m,z,L,G,w,p,I,Y,b,P)return D(n,{m,z,L,G;w;p,I,Y,b;P},s,i)end return m end,function(n,s)local i=P(s)local m=function(m,z,L)return D(n,{m;z,L},s,i)end return m end return(X(6351212-679249,{}))(i(w))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[s(-325489-(-317471))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
